question: Who is older, Hampton Del Ruth or Ted Kotcheff? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Hampton Del Ruth: Hampton Del Ruth (September 7, 1879 - May 15, 1958) was an American film actor, director, screenwriter, and film producer.
1.subquestion: When was Hampton Del Ruth born?

2.fact: Ted Kotcheff: William Theodore Ted Kotcheff (born April 7, 1931; as Velichko Todorov Tsochev) is a Bulgarian-Canadian film and television director and producer.

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Hampton Del Ruth was born on September 7, 1879, while Ted Kotcheff was born on April 7, 1931, so Hampton Del Ruth is older. -> Hampton Del Ruth
